lanes.name: Always-On Research
lanes.narrative: The pipeline monitors two ecosystems — the AI practitioner world and the founder community forums — finds the intersection, and surfaces what's worth writing before Sondra has to go looking.

lanes.name: Voice as a Moat
lanes.narrative: Every article sharpens what the pipeline knows — about search, about Sondra's body of work, and about what her writing actually looks like when it's at its best.

lanes.name: Visual Authority
lanes.narrative: Every article looks like it was art-directed — with images at every scroll depth, charts that prove the numbers, pull quotes that beg to be shared, and preview cards that demand clicks.

lanes.name: Reach Multiplier
lanes.narrative: One research pass, every format and platform it needs to land on — from LinkedIn posts to newsletter editions to a fully-owned public blog.

lanes.name: Strategic Command
lanes.narrative: From reactive writing to intentional content strategy — plan arcs, schedule publishing, and close the loop with performance data that shapes what gets written next.
